title: Improve the RizzAssist logo artwork (same filename/dimensions)

requirements.text: Replace the existing generated RizzAssist logo image with a higher-quality, more visually striking logo while keeping the exact same filename and dimensions so it continues to render everywhere it is referenced (including the header image at `/assets/generated/rizzassist-logo.dim_512x256.png`).
acceptanceCriteria: The file `frontend/public/assets/generated/rizzassist-logo.dim_512x256.png` is updated with improved artwork.
The updated logo retains the exact dimensions implied by the filename (`512x256`) and the exact same filename/path.
The header continues to render the logo without any code changes required to references (i.e., `AppHeader` still points to `/assets/generated/rizzassist-logo.dim_512x256.png`).

constraints: Keep the exact same logo asset filename and dimensions: `rizzassist-logo.dim_512x256.png` (512x256).
Use English for any user-facing text.
nonGoals: Do not change backend logic or data models.
Do not add new pages or user flows.
Do not rename the product or alter existing navigation/content.
